description: Phase 11 Task 1: locked the post-P10 starting line for the fp16-AMX integration target on Apple M3 Pro. The headline is to beat this number with ESM_APPLE_AMX=on after T7.
hardware: Apple M3 Pro (6P+6E, 12 logical, 18 GB RAM, macOS 26.3.1)
varlen_baseline: P9 measured esm-cpp-int8 varlen=37828ms p50 vs HF=150071ms (3.97x); P10 T6/T8 kernels improve it but the slow HF baseline was not re-run — that's T7's job post-AMX.

convert_time_env.path: /tmp/ct312/bin/python (a throwaway venv from P10; will be promoted to .venv-ct or documented in tools/build_amx_artifacts.py for Phase 11 production use)
convert_time_env.why_separate: coremltools 9.0 ships pure-Python wheels for Python 3.14 (missing libcoremlpython + libmilstoragepython native libs needed for MIL blob serialization). Native libs are present in the 3.12 wheel. Convert-time only; the 3.14 runtime needs zero coremltools.
